header.title: Smart BMI & Body Context

streak.title: Maintained Healthy Range!
streak.subtitle: {{count}} consecutive readings in the healthy zone 🎉

calculator.title: Calculate Your BMI

results.placeholder: Enter your measurements to see your BMI

calculator.tip: Consider incorporating regular exercise and a balanced diet into your routine.

disclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: BMI is a general screening tool and does not differentiate between muscle and fat mass. Consult with healthcare professionals for personalized medical advice.

why.title: Why This Matters
why.desc: Keeping your waist circumference to less than half your height reduces cardiovascular risk. WHtR is more accurate than BMI for predicting metabolic health conditions.

inputs.waistHint: Measure at the narrowest point of your waist, usually just above the belly button

results.placeholder: Please enter height and waist to see your ratio
results.label: Waist-to-Height Ratio

bmi.title: BMI
bmi.desc: General weight category, doesn't account for muscle mass or fat distribution

whtr.title: WHtR
whtr.desc: Measures central obesity, better predictor of cardiovascular disease and diabetes

history.title: Recent Measurements
history.noHistoryDesc: Start tracking your BMI and body metrics to see your progress trends over time.
